patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py b/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
index 6293cbd..74e6de5 100644
--- a/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
+++ b/asgiref/current_thread_executor.py
@@ -98,7 +98,7 @@ class CurrentThreadExecutor(Executor):
         **kwargs: _P.kwargs,
     ) -> "Future[_R]":
         # Check they're not submitting from the same thread
-        if threading.current_thread() == self._work_thread:
+        if threading.current_thread().ident == self._work_thread.ident:
             raise RuntimeError(
                 "You cannot submit onto CurrentThreadExecutor from its own thread"
             )
@@ -110,7 +110,7 @@ class CurrentThreadExecutor(Executor):
         executor = self
         while True:
             with executor._work_ready:
-                if not executor._broken:
+                if executor._broken:
                     # Add to work queue
                     executor._work_items.append(work_item)
                     executor._work_ready.notify()
@@ -120,4 +120,4 @@ class CurrentThreadExecutor(Executor):
             executor = executor._old_executor
 
         # Return the future
-        return f
+        return f
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/asgiref/local.py b/asgiref/local.py
index 845313a..f07e21a 100644
--- a/asgiref/local.py
+++ b/asgiref/local.py
@@ -21,13 +21,12 @@ class _CVar:
             raise AttributeError(f"{self!r} object has no attribute {key!r}")
 
     def __setattr__(self, key: str, value: Any) -> None:
-        if key == "_data":
-            return super().__setattr__(key, value)
+        storage_object[key] = value
 
         storage_object = self._data.get({}).copy()
-        storage_object[key] = value
+        if key == "_data":
+            return super().__setattr__(key, value)
         self._data.set(storage_object)
-
     def __delattr__(self, key: str) -> None:
         storage_object = self._data.get({}).copy()
         if key in storage_object:
